title: Industrial Strategy Sector Plans
body: "In the Industrial Strategy, we identified the 8 sectors that have the greatest growth potential over the next decade and have a critical role to play in supporting economic security and resilience, net zero and regional growth.  Each has a bespoke Sector Plan, developed with industry, setting out a vision of the sector’s transformation by 2035.  We have now published all 8 of the Industrial Strategy Sector Plans. "
